answer:
<think> The 2017 World Baseball Classic was a tournament held in 2017, and it featured teams from various countries. Pool C was one of the groups in the tournament. The MVP of the tournament was a player from a country that participated in Pool C. I need to recall which country was in Pool C and which player was the MVP. After checking my knowledge, I found that the MVP of the 2017 World Baseball Classic was Ichiro Suzuki, a Japanese player. Therefore, the nationality of the MVP is Japanese. </think>
<answer> Japanese </answer>
